settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Roasted mix of nuts, seeds, and semolina, a traditional postpartum and energy-boosting snack.

settings.heading: Daily Healthy Ritual
settings.step1_text: Consume 2-3 tablespoons daily with warm milk
settings.step2_text: Perfect as a morning breakfast boost
settings.step3_text: Enjoy as a healthy evening snack
